articles.title: Shiba Inu Unveils New Partnership, SHIB Trade Volume Spikes
articles.description: For a while now, Shiba Inu has been revealing some interesting partnerships. A couple of days ago, the official Twitter page of the meme coin teased a new partnership with luxury car manufacturer Bugatti when it tagged it in a post. However, it is no longer just speculation as Shiba Inu has confirmed the partnership. […]

articles.title: Ava Labs partners with AWS to offer one-click node deployment
articles.description: Other new features include a subnet deployment service and GovCloud integration for compliance-friendly Dapps

articles.title: Binance Stakes 4,000,000,000,000 Shiba Inu (SHIB) As Project Details Update on New Layer-2 Blockchain
articles.description: The world’s largest crypto exchange by volume is staking trillions of Shiba Inu (SHIB) tokens as the dog-themed asset provides updates on its upcoming layer-2 project. According to data from whale-surveying platform WhaleAlert, Binance sent a staggering 4 trillion Shiba Inu worth about $35 million at time of writing to an unknown wallet for staking […]

articles.title: Dozens of New Cardano Whales Emerge As ADA Bounces Big in Less Than Two Weeks: Analytics Firm
articles.description: Dozens of new Cardano (ADA) whale and “shark” addresses are emerging amid Cardano’s price surge in the early days of 2023, according to the crypto analytics firm Santiment. Santiment says 28 new addresses holding at least one million ADA have formed since the beginning of the year. The analytics firm also notes that the Ethereum […]

articles.title: FTX has recovered over $5B in cash and liquid crypto: Report
articles.description: Previous reports suggested that FTX saw losses peak at nearly $9 billion in total liabilities.

articles.title: BNB Flips USDC, Cardano Flips Dogecoin With Crypto Relief Rally
articles.description: Binance’s BNB has benefitted as crypto looks to recover from a dismal quarter, now usurping USDC on leaderboards

articles.title: Solana price rally risks exhaustion after SOL’s 120% pump in 2 weeks
articles.description: SOL price has been unable to close above a key resistance level of around $17.50 despite its big rebound in the past two weeks.

articles.title: Voyager Gets Initial Green Light For $1 Billion Asset Sale To Binance.US
articles.description: Binance.US got one step closer to fully acquiring Voyager Digital, a crypto company that went belly up recently. According to to a report by Reuters, Voyager Digital won preliminary court clearance for a potential $1 billion sale of its assets to Binance.US, and indicated that it will seek to hasten a US national security evaluation […]

articles.title: Shibu Inu ($SHIB) Suggests New Partnership with luxury brand Bugatti Group Will Soon be Revealed
articles.description: A tweet from Shiba Inu ecosystem’s social media account has suggested a new partnership between the meme-inspired cryptocurrency and the North American luxury brand Bugatti Group is set to be announced.
